title_ru: Физики ЧелГУ посвятили свои диссертации углеродным алмазоподобным фазам и сплавам Гейслера

description_en: A Chelyabinsk State University news item on physics dissertation defenses; Danil Baigutlin is mentioned in connection with work on Heusler alloys.

title_ru: Исследования, форумы, журналы: учёные ЧелГУ получили поддержку вуза

description_en: A Chelyabinsk State University news item about support for university research and scientific activity; the page is returned by the CSU search for Baigutlin.

description_en: A Chelyabinsk State University news item on a calorics research event and CSU physicists' participation; the material is found by CSU search for Baigutlin.

description_en: A Chelyabinsk State University news item about scholarship recipients; Danil Baigutlin is found on the page among the mentioned recipients.
